description: AI Agent 领域最新情报

models.title: Sources: Anthropic potential $900B+ valuation round could happen within 2 weeks
models.summary: Anthropic is asking investors to submit allocations for the AI company’s latest fundraise within the next 48 hours, according to sources familiar with the matter.
models.title_zh: 资料来源：人择潜力$ 9000亿+估值回合可能在2周内进行
models.summary_zh: 据知情人士透露， Anthropic要求投资者在接下来的48小时内为该人工智能公司的最新筹款活动提交拨款。
models.title_en: Sources: Anthropic potential $900B+ valuation round could happen within 2 weeks
models.summary_en: Anthropic is asking investors to submit allocations for the AI company’s latest fundraise within the next 48 hours, according to sources familiar with the matter.

models.title: Apple was surprised by AI-driven demand for Macs
models.summary: Apple said it will be supply-constrained on Mac mini, Studio, and Neo in the next quarter, too.
models.title_zh: 苹果对人工智能驱动的Mac需求感到惊讶
models.summary_zh: 苹果表示，下个季度Mac mini、Studio和NEO的供应也将受到限制。
models.title_en: Apple was surprised by AI-driven demand for Macs
models.summary_en: Apple said it will be supply-constrained on Mac mini, Studio, and Neo in the next quarter, too.

models.title: Legal AI startup Legora hits $5.6B valuation and its battle with Harvey just got hotter
models.summary: The two wildly fast-growing rivals have raised massive sums, pushed into each other's home turf, and now have dueling ad campaigns.
models.title_zh: 法律AI初创公司Legora的估值达到56亿美元，与Harvey的战斗变得更加激烈
models.summary_zh: 这两个快速增长的竞争对手已经筹集了大量资金，相互挤进对方的主场，现在进行了决斗广告活动。
models.title_en: Legal AI startup Legora hits $5.6B valuation and its battle with Harvey just got hotter
models.summary_en: The two wildly fast-growing rivals have raised massive sums, pushed into each other's home turf, and now have dueling ad campaigns.

models.title: After dissing Anthropic for limiting Mythos, OpenAI restricts access to Cyber, too
models.summary: OpenAI will begin rolling out its cybersecurity testing tool, GPT-5.5 Cyber only "to critical cyber defenders" at first.
models.title_zh: 在驳斥Anthropic限制Mythos之后， OpenAI也限制了对Cyber的访问
models.summary_zh: OpenAI将首先向“关键网络防御者”推出其网络安全测试工具GPT-5.5 Cyber。
models.title_en: After dissing Anthropic for limiting Mythos, OpenAI restricts access to Cyber, too
models.summary_en: OpenAI will begin rolling out its cybersecurity testing tool, GPT-5.5 Cyber only "to critical cyber defenders" at first.

community.title: Shai-Hulud Themed Malware Found in the PyTorch Lightning AI Training Library
community.title_zh: 在PyTorch Lightning AI训练库中发现Shai-Hulud主题恶意软件
community.title_en: Shai-Hulud Themed Malware Found in the PyTorch Lightning AI Training Library

community.title: CopyFail was not disclosed to distro developers?
community.title_zh: CopyFail未向发行版开发人员披露？
community.title_en: CopyFail was not disclosed to distro developers?

community.title: Claude Code refuses requests or charges extra if your commits mention "OpenClaw"
community.title_zh: 如果您的承诺提到“OpenClaw” ， Claude Code会拒绝请求或收取额外费用
community.title_en: Claude Code refuses requests or charges extra if your commits mention "OpenClaw"

community.title: Spain's parliament will act against massive IP blockages by LaLiga
community.title_zh: 西班牙议会将对西甲的大规模知识产权封锁采取行动
community.title_en: Spain's parliament will act against massive IP blockages by LaLiga

community.title: Show HN: Pu.sh – a full coding-agent harness in 400 lines of shell
community.title_zh: 显示HN ： Pu.sh - 400行外壳的完整编码代理线束
